# GroUp Academy

> AI-powered career acceleration platform. Career Readiness Scorecard, Mock Interviews, Salary Analysis, Digital Portfolio, Jobs Board, Learning Tracks, and an inbox of AI agents for hiring, learning, and ops.

GroUp Academy helps talents land jobs and grow careers, and helps companies hire, train, and manage workforce — all through chat-first AI agents and verifiable skill credentials.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Platform overview and entry point.
- [Services](/services): All career services (assessment, interview, salary, portfolio).
- [Courses](/courses): Course catalog and learning tracks.
- [Career Assessment](/service/career-assessment): AI-driven career readiness scorecard.
- [Mock Interview](/service/mock-interview): Practice interviews with AI feedback.
- [Salary Analysis](/service/salary-analysis): Market-rate salary insights.
- [Digital Portfolio](/service/portfolio): Build a verifiable portfolio.
- [Jobs](/jobs): Jobs board with verified-skill matching.
- [Blog](/blog): Career insights, guides, and platform updates.
- [Sign in](/auth): Authenticate to access the full app.

## Optional

- [Classic sign in](/auth/classic): Email/password fallback.
- [Reset password](/reset-password): Account recovery.
